parameters.query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM qr_tokens WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours') as qr_scanned_today,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM smarter_rule_log WHERE executed_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours') as validations_today,
  (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(quantity), 0) FROM inventory WHERE tenant_slug = 'ecocupon_cl') as total_inventory,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM funnel_metrics WHERE date = CURRENT_DATE) as checkouts_today
